scores.materiality_reasoning: Ritual attendance is primarily symbolic, though it involves physical access to a space.
scores.generality_reasoning: Resource is tied to one specific recurring festival (Thesmophoria).
scores.persistence_reasoning: Resource is active during a specific, recurring annual religious period.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Group is defined by biological sex (Men).
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: The author describes a contemporary Athenian religious practice.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Framed as a known social/religious prohibition with serious risks.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Being male does not inherently define exclusion from all secret rites.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Right to attend a festival is a ritual/social role with little material payoff.
scores.generality_reasoning: Specifically tied to the Thesmophoria festival.
scores.persistence_reasoning: Applies during the annual duration of the specific festival.
scores.immutability_reasoning: Group is defined by biological sex.
scores.contemporarity_reasoning: Reflects the actual functioning of Athenian gender-segregated festivals.
scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Verbatim details the extreme measures needed to bypass a known legal/sacred bar.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Membership in the group 'Men' does not definitionally include 'banned from Thesmophoria'.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Access to 'mysteries' (secret knowledge) is purely spiritual/abstract.

scores.opinion_vs_fact_reasoning: Reported as an imperative rule ('no man may hear') within the setting.
scores.tautology_reasoning: Gender does not definitionally exclude one from hearing mysteries.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Right to speak in a formal assembly is a concrete legal/procedural right.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Protection from state magistrates is a matter of bodily/legal integrity.

scores.materiality_reasoning: Freedom of movement is a tangible physical entitlement.

scores.tautology_reasoning: Being a woman does not definitionally mean being confined to a house.
